mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ExamStarePaperHstyDAO.listPaperHstyLog 설 명 : 응시 시험지 답안 이력 */
SELECT A.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'HSTRY_TYCD' AND CD = A.HSTRY_TYCD AND ROWNUM = 1) AS HSTY_TYPE_NM FROM ( SELECT A.STARE_ANSR , A.QSTN_SEQNO , (SELECT HSTRY_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND FRST_INQ_DTTM = A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS HSTRY_TYCD , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , (SELECT CNTN_IP FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND FRST_INQ_DTTM = A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS CNTN_IP FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_PAPER_HSTY A WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND A.STARE_ANSR IS NOT NULL ) A WHERE A.HSTRY_TYCD IS NOT NULL AND A.QSTN_SEQNO = #{qstnNo}
